author: François Chalifour
subject: v6.2.0
body:
# [6.2.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.1.0...v6.2.0) (2020-01-20)

### Bug Fixes

* **deps:** update dependency algoliasearch to v3.35.1 ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2802](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2802)) ([b3259bb](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/b3259bb))
* **widgets:** rename `ExperimentalConfigureRelatedItems` compon… ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2891](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2891)) ([8e515f3](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/8e515f3))

### Features

* **insights:** add getInsightsAnonymousUserToken helper ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2887](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2887)) ([a18c54e](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a18c54e))
* **widgets:** introduce `ConfigureRelatedItems` as experimental ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2880](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2880)) ([b5e1ce4](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/b5e1ce4))
